_note: Create these 3 products in Stripe Dashboard → Products → Add Product, then create Payment Links for each. Replace YOUR_VERCEL_DOMAIN throughout.

products.description: Lifetime access to LinkFlow Pro — unlimited bio pages, links, analytics, custom domains, commercial license

payment_link_settings._note_success: IMPORTANT: Success URL goes to /upsell (OTO page), NOT /thankyou — buyer sees upsell offer after purchase
payment_link_settings._note_cancel: Cancel returns to sales page so buyer can reconsider

products.description: 25 client accounts, white-label branding, client reporting, agency training, DFY onboarding templates
DFY page templates, conversion optimization audit, advanced analytics masterclass

payment_link_settings._note_cancel: Decline DS1 → /thankyou (base confirmation, they still have FE)

setup_steps: 1. Go to: dashboard.stripe.com → Products → + Add product
2. Create LinkFlow Pro: $97 one-time, name + description from above
3. Click 'Create payment link' → set Success URL to YOUR_VERCEL_DOMAIN/upsell
4. Copy payment link URL — paste into sales/index.html replacing STRIPE_PAYMENT_LINK_FRONTEND
5. Repeat for Agency License ($197) — Success URL: /thankyou-agency, Cancel: /downsell
6. Repeat for Accelerator Pack ($47) — Success URL: /thankyou-starter, Cancel: /thankyou
7. Do NOT use test mode links in production — use live keys (sk_live_...)

find_and_replace_guide.STRIPE_PAYMENT_LINK_FRONTEND: Paste your $97 Stripe payment link here (e.g. https://buy.stripe.com/...)
find_and_replace_guide.STRIPE_PAYMENT_LINK_UPSELL: Paste your $197 Stripe payment link here
find_and_replace_guide.STRIPE_PAYMENT_LINK_DOWNSELL: Paste your $47 Stripe payment link here
